visual_description: A close‑up shows a man with dark hair in the front seat of a dimly lit car, holding a white cloth to his mouth while his eyes are slightly downcast. In the background, another man in dark clothing sits in the passenger seat, looking forward with a neutral expression. The interior is dark and the lighting is low, highlighting the wet sheen on the foreground man's face.
audio_description: There is no audible speech; only faint ambient noise can be heard.
